# UC-22.50.7 · Petroleumsforskriften §11 — emergency preparedness drill evidence

## Description

Tracks emergency-preparedness drill frequency, real activations and PSA notifications per offshore installation.

## Value

§11 requires demonstrable preparedness for emergency situations; drill cadence and activation records are auditor-facing evidence.

## Implementation

(1) Ingest drill logs from the offshore operational systems; (2) schedule quarterly; (3) feed results into the PSA (Petroleumstilsynet) evidence pack. Indexes required: `index=psa_emergency`.

## Detailed Implementation

Prerequisites
• Install and configure the required add-on or app: Splunk Enterprise / Splunk Cloud Platform.
• Ensure the following data sources are available: Emergency drill logs, Edge Hub OT alerts, PSA notifications index..
• For app installation, inputs.conf, and Splunk directory layout, see the Implementation guide: docs/implementation-guide.md

Step 1 — Configure data collection
(1) Ingest drill logs from the offshore operational systems; (2) schedule quarterly; (3) feed results into the PSA (Petroleumstilsynet) evidence pack.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert
Run the following SPL in Search (then save as report or alert; adjust time range and threshold as needed):

```spl
index=psa_emergency earliest=-180d
| search (event_type="drill" OR event_type="activation" OR event_type="psa_notification")
| stats count(eval(event_type="drill")) AS drill_count count(eval(event_type="activation")) AS activation_count count(eval(event_type="psa_notification")) AS psa_notifications BY installation_id, facility_type
| eval drill_status=if(drill_count>=4,"compliant","gap")
| table installation_id, facility_type, drill_count, activation_count, psa_notifications, drill_status
```

Understanding this SPL

**Petroleumsforskriften §11 — emergency preparedness drill evidence** — §11 requires demonstrable preparedness for emergency situations; drill cadence and activation records are auditor-facing evidence.

Documented **Data sources**: Emergency drill logs, Edge Hub OT alerts, PSA notifications index. **App/TA** (typical add-on context): Splunk Enterprise / Splunk Cloud Platform. The SPL below should target the same indexes and sourcetypes you configured for that feed—rename `index=` / `sourcetype=` if your deployment differs.

The first pipeline stage scopes events using **index**: psa_emergency.

**Pipeline walkthrough**

• Scopes the data: index=psa_emergency, time bounds. Cross-check against **Data sources** above so indexes and sourcetypes match your ingestion.
• Applies an explicit `search` filter to narrow the current result set.
• `stats` aggregates events by **installation_id, facility_type**, producing one row per unique combination for trend analysis and threshold evaluation.
• `eval` defines or adjusts **drill_status** — applying business logic to classify, threshold, or derive compliance-relevant indicators.

Output fields: activation_count, drill_count, drill_status, facility_type, installation_id, psa_notifications.

Step 3 — Validate
Compare results with the audit register and the GRC system so evidence lines up with control owners, attestations, and retention policy.

Step 4 — Operationalize
Add the search to a dashboard or set up alert actions (email, webhook, PagerDuty, etc.) as required. Document the use case in your runbook and assign an owner. Consider visualizations: Table of flagged records for investigation; single-value KPI of coverage / compliance percentage; time chart of trend over the last 90 days; drill-down per responsible owner.

## SPL

```spl
index=psa_emergency earliest=-180d
| search (event_type="drill" OR event_type="activation" OR event_type="psa_notification")
| stats count(eval(event_type="drill")) AS drill_count count(eval(event_type="activation")) AS activation_count count(eval(event_type="psa_notification")) AS psa_notifications BY installation_id, facility_type
| eval drill_status=if(drill_count>=4,"compliant","gap")
| table installation_id, facility_type, drill_count, activation_count, psa_notifications, drill_status
```

## Visualization

Table of flagged records for investigation; single-value KPI of coverage / compliance percentage; time chart of trend over the last 90 days; drill-down per responsible owner. Key fields: `activation_count`, `drill_count`, `drill_status`, `facility_type`, `installation_id`, `psa_notifications`.
